name: Tsubaki Nakashima Co., Ltd.
summary: Tsubaki Nakashima Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells industrial precision balls, rollers, and sheet metal parts worldwide. The company operates through Precision Component Business, Linear Business, and Others Business segments. It offers precision steel balls, including bearing and stainless steel, ballpoint pen, and various metal balls for use in home electronics, such as air conditioners, refrigerators, and vacuum cleaners; and precision rollers and stampings comprising tapered, spherical, cylindrical, and needle rollers, as well as cages, sheet metal stampings, and welded products for transmission, engine, pump, wheel bearing, mining, heavy industry, and railway applications. The company also provides precision ceramic balls, including silicon nitride balls for use in electric vehicles, wind power generators, semiconductor manufacturing equipment, and other applications; and alumina oxide balls for use in agriculture, dairy, water treatment, and automotive industries. In addition, it offers ball screws, such as long/large diameter, rolled, precision, and precision and standard rolled ball screws for machine tools, electric injection molding machines, semiconductor manufacturing equipment, industrial robots, and advanced medical equipment applications; ball screws for the heavy load; support units for ball screws; precision and precision miniature ball ways; slideways, bushings, units, and shafts; 30 degrees trapezoid feed screws; and precision planetary roller screws and recirculating roller screws. Further, the company provides iron and steel, electric power, wind tunnel, and other blowers for steel, thermal power, and nuclear power applications; and customized solutions comprising solid plastic balls, specially manufactured products, and glass balls for medical diagnostic tests and devices. Additionally, it is involved in the leasing of real estate properties. Tsubaki Nakashima Co., Ltd. was founded in 1934 and is headquartered in Katsuragi, Japan.
